channel.title: Markdown on Logan Barnett's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Markdown on Logan Barnett's blog

item.title: Markdown flavored shoes
item.description: I’ve known and used Markdown here and there for some time, but I’m starting to really see its value. On the surface, Markdown is a way to take text and make decent looking HTML out of it, and the text still looks like some typical formatting in a plain text environment. I’ve sent managers these kinds of files, and they can just open these files in any text editor if they don’t have means of viewing Markdown.
